_meta.note: Top-level README.md prose (pill buttons 999px, 18-28px card radii) CONTRADICTS colors_and_type.css, which is explicitly marked 'AUTHORITATIVE SOURCE' (buttons 4px, cards <=8px). This tokens.json follows the CSS files + the interactive prototype, not the README prose.
_meta.primaryDesignSource: ui_kits/website/index.html + App.jsx (per SKILL.md instruction) — the beleaf-next/ Next.js folder inside the handoff is a partial, lower-fidelity port and is NOT used as source of truth.

usage.navy: PRIMARY — hero, nav pill, footer, dark sections, headings/strong text on light
usage.orange: The ONLY accent — CTAs, logo dot, one highlight per view. Never decorative.
usage.offWhite: Alternating section background for rhythm without introducing color
usage.rule: Strict alternation required top-to-bottom: navy -> orange(marquee) -> off-white -> white -> navy -> off-white -> white -> navy -> off-white -> navy. Never two consecutive white sections.

radii.rule: Buttons are hard 4px rectangles (NOT pill, despite outdated README prose). Cards max 8px. Only nav/chip/badge/pill-shaped controls use 999px.

shadows.flat: 0 0 0 1px var(--border)  — card depth = border, not shadow
shadows.rule: Depth = color + border, not decorative shadows. Shadows reserved for small isolated floating surfaces.

breakpoints.tablet: 720px / 768px (both used — 768px is the dominant nav/section breakpoint, 720px used in servicio.css hero/detail pages)
breakpoints.note: Mobile-first is NOT used; all media queries are max-width, cascading down from desktop base styles.

rules: Never ease-in on UI. Never transition: all. Never bounce/elastic.
Entrance never from scale(0) — minimum scale(0.94) translateY(8px).
Scroll reveal via IntersectionObserver only, never scroll listeners.
prefers-reduced-motion: reduce must be honored everywhere (fades survive, transforms/parallax/cursor/marquee are stripped).
signatures: Custom orange dot cursor with lerp follow (coef 0.12-0.18), expands to a 40px ring on interactive hover, hidden on touch/reduced-motion
Service/stack card top-border lights orange + arrow slides in on hover
Primary button hover: translateY(-2px) + lightens to orange-light + shadow grows
One marquee per page max (orange bg, navy text, linear infinite, pauses on hover)
CountUp numbers on viewport entry (cubic ease-out, ~1.1s)
Terminal typing/line-reveal effect in AI section
Typewriter hero H1 (30ms/char, 500ms start delay, reduced-motion renders full text instantly)
BlurReveal: per-word translateY(20px)+blur(8px)->0 stagger ~30ms/word on headings

button.note: Nav/chip 'pill' buttons (PillNav CTA, filter chips, quote-form chips) are visually distinct: 999px radius, used only for nav items / multi-select chips, never for primary form-submit CTAs which stay 4px rectangles.

service.border: 1px hairline var(--border) via shared grid lines (border-collapse look)
service.icon: 46x46 box, radius 6px, bg orange-tint, icon 23px orange-deep

card.generalRule: Cards: white bg, hairline border #e8ecf1, radius <=8px, shadow=border not box-shadow. Icon boxes use orange-tint wash + orange-deep icon.

nav.type: PillNav (current/authoritative) — floating navy pill logo + navy pill rail with rising-coral-circle hover fill + label-stack swap animation, separate solid-coral CTA pill
nav.legacy: Flat full-width Nav (Sections1.jsx) is superseded by PillNav.jsx which overrides window.Nav — implement the pill version
nav.behavior: Fixed top, transparent over hero, compacts/adds shadow on scroll (IntersectionObserver on a sentinel span, not scroll listener). Mobile: burger opens a rounded navy dropdown panel.
nav.servicesDropdown: hover-opened dropdown listing the 6 service pillar pages

badge.chip: pill 999px, border 1px, transparent bg, toggles to navy bg + white text when active (filter/service-select chips)
badge.tag: orange-tint bg, orange-deep text, radius 4px (e.g. testimonial result tag, 'Pronto' soon-tag)

modal.quoteWizard: 4-step multi-step form: servicios -> detalles -> datos de contacto -> revisión. Segmented coral progress bar, slide+fade step transitions, inline validation, editable review chips.

homepage_order: Hero (navy, typewriter H1, multi-select service pills + live quote banner, 4 stat counters)
Marquee (orange bg, single infinite loop of service names)
Services (white, 6-card grid: Desarrollo web, E-commerce, SEO técnico IA, Automatización IA, CRM, SaaS)
AISection (navy, 'Metodología AI' copy + live-typing terminal mock)
SEOSection (off-white, 3 numbered cards: auditoría, contenido, autoridad)
HorizontalGallery (white, GSAP ScrollTrigger pinned horizontal project scroller, degrades to native scroll-snap on mobile/reduced-motion)
TestimonialsMarquee (off-white, infinite horizontal loop of 6 client quotes, edge-masked)
Stack (navy, magnetic-hover logo-cloud of 12 tools grouped by category)
Footer (SiteFooter — navy-deep, bilingual ES/EN, 4-col: brand+lang toggle, Servicios, Compañía, Contacto+socials, newsletter band, legal strip)
ContactModal / QuoteModal (rendered globally, opened by nav CTA / hero banner / FinalCTA — not a static section)
otherPagesInHandoff_notYetRead: pilar-*.html x6 — individual service detail pages (desarrollo-web, ecommerce, seo, automatizacion, crm, saas)
cotizador.html — standalone quote wizard demo (same component as QuoteModal)
blog.html / blog-articulo.html — out of current mission scope, not planned as a route
sections.DESIGN_TODO: /contacto in the mission's route list has no direct prototype page — the prototype instead uses a global QuoteModal opened from CTAs. Will build /contacto as a static page embedding the same multi-step form content, per mission's explicit route list.

logos.logoDark: ui_kits/website/assets/logo-dark.svg (cream wordmark, for navy/dark surfaces — also used inside the always-navy PillNav pill regardless of page bg)

fonts.implementationNote: Since Urbanist is on Google Fonts, use next/font/google in the Next.js build rather than self-hosting the TTFs, per mission rule (never a <link> tag; self-host only if not on Google Fonts).

icons.system: Lucide (line/outline, 2px stroke) via lucide-react in production. Sizes: 20px inline/UI, 24px cards, 28-32px featured.
icons.customSvgSocials: Instagram/LinkedIn/Facebook/Google Business are hand-drawn inline SVGs in SiteFooter.jsx (BF_GLYPHS) — not Lucide, since lucide dropped brand marks. Recreate as small local SVG components, not <svg> pasted inline in JSX.

images.status: No real photography/mockup assets shipped in the handoff — project cards, gallery cards, hero use a placeholder <image-slot> custom element (image-slot.js) with a labeled placeholder box, not real imagery.
images.DESIGN_TODO: All project/portfolio imagery needs real assets from the client or high-quality placeholders; none exist in the handoff beyond the logo and scratch/reference JPGs in _scratch/ and scraps/ (which are the designer's own moodboard references, not site assets — do not ship them).
